title: Hanging Basket Chains 3 Point (Pack of 4) 14" Inch 36cm Metal Replacement Chain For Hanging Basket Bird Feeder Flower pots and Ornaments
features: Strong & Durable – Each 3-strand chain is crafted from sturdy metal to securely support hanging baskets, planters, bird feeders, lanterns, and more.
Perfect Length – Measuring 14 inches (36cm), these replacement chains offer the ideal drop length for displaying ornaments or plants indoors and outdoors.
Weather-Resistant – Built to withstand the elements, these rust-resistant chains are great for year-round use in gardens, patios, balconies, or greenhouses.
Pack of 4 Chains – Supplied in a handy 4-pack for great value and convenience – perfect for multiple projects or replacing old or damaged chains.
Easy to Install – Each chain includes secure hooks for fast, hassle-free attachment to baskets, brackets, or ceiling hooks – no tools required.
